thoughts dump: den-o + headcanons

skip to:

  • what's it?!
  • things i like
  • diagetics headcanons
  • how it works headcanons
  • things i dunno
  • relationships headcanons
  • (smash announcer voice) ACE!
  • ranking all versions of double action
  • airi and yuuto thoughts

(only watches animated works voice) have you people heard of live action this stuff is insane these guys are scuttling all over the place and getting thrown off buildings

awesome reading music for you: imagin cover of the opening!!!

what’s it?!

kamen rider den-o is the 2007 installment of the long-running kamen rider series!!!

kamen rider is a kid’s tokusatsu (live action with tons of special effects) show about a hero who transforms to fight evil, and every season features a new cast/premise/marketable gimmick

den-o is about a time-traveling train, our guy who’s possessed by 4 color-coded demons, and coffee that looks like playdough?!

if you wanna appraise the vibes yourself, the first 2 episodes are up for free on the official youtube channel! :^]

things i like

  • coming from a long and winding heritage of lupin iii and yakuza, i have identified the targeted appeal of den-o: despite being a kid’s show with a teen protagonist, the cast has an exorbitantly high saturation of middle-aged men/otherwise grown adults (characters, voice actors, suit actors) LMAOOOOO
  • SUIT ACTING + STUNTS ARE COOL AS!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! i’ve been mesmerized watching seiji takaiwa (veteran suit actor, momotaros and den-o) break down fight choreography and demonstrate how he moves! and just in general the stuff these suit actors do completely unassisted is INSANE. ALL WHILE BARELY BEING ABLE TO SEE OUT OF THE COSTUMES……
  • “there’s some kind of awesome jazzy ost happening but i can’t hear it over the 50 simultaneous overlapping train sounds and explosions”
  • again i really cannot overstate how good these actors are at Moving so particularly and expressively, it’s ridiculously fun to watch no matter what they’re up to
  • they have evil versions of the music LMAO
    • climax jump hip hop version vs. DARK hip hop version
    • the movie villain gets to sing his own cover of the theme song (double action)
  • they only have 1 sword hit sound effect so it just plays 100 times per fight
  • the den-o mega album/ost is over 14 hours long KJGFGJF everyone gets to take turns singing/rapping their own covers of the songs
  • completely unexplained powerscaling
    • why is ryuutaros’s possession so much stronger than the others’, and sieg’s is even stronger than his? what does sieg being born more recently(?) have to do with it???
    • why are some enemy imagin super weak while others nearly kill the protags?
  • loud hollow metal hit sound effect when one of the taros gets slapped on the head
  • they are always doing increasingly elaborate bits in the background of the dining car it’s so friggin good
  • there are some genuinely crazy shots happening here
    • they sometimes do an insanely strong and fast dollyzoom, i have no idea what kind of camera they’re using that allows that??? and it’s done from relatively close up, so they’re not speeding down a mile-long dolly track or anything
    • the shot of seig in the dark curled up under an oval spotlight, depicting him in his mother’s womb
    • the super low to the ground shot of a street grate, through which ryoutarou’s and hana’s fingers slowly emerge

diagetics headcanons

are imagin possession effects diagetic?

(AKA do they exist in-universe, rather than only from the audience’s perspective?)

on one hand, NPCs are baffled by changes in ryoutarou’s behavior, but never indicate changes in physical appearance (eye color, hair, etc.)

on the other hand, possessed ryoutarou touches/poses with his glasses/hat, indicating physical objects.

and on the third, if the effects are like imagin sand, which goes unnoticed by NPCs but does visually alert the protagonists, then maybe only imagin knowers can see them.

(ACTUALLY in “episode blue” ryuutaros explicitly points out the sand to a civilian grandma, but i couldn’t tell if she was just playing along with this bizarre kid who barged into her house uninvited.)

i think realistically the answer is “only visible to imagin knowers”, but in my heart they’re fully diagetic since that’s the funniest option. these guys are so dedicated to their looks they’re either materializing outfits through sheer force of will, or they’re making ryoutarou carry 4(?) costumes at all times

(alternatively, “no” would mean urataros is miming wearing glasses which is also extremely silly)

what are the main imagin’s bodies made of?

typically enemy imagin have obvious fullbody themes and materials — metal armor, bird feathers, slimy jellyfish flesh, etc. — in comparison, the taros’s are visually much more “guy in a suit”.

their armor pieces are easy to explain, turtle shells or gold metal or whatever, but momotaros and urataros especially have a ton of exposed “body” between those pieces… so what is that supposed to be???

momotaros’s face is skull-like and the pattern on his stomach resembles abdominal muscles, so i could see him being some kind of sinewy bone+muscle creature.

i don’t actually know what urataros is supposed to be presumably leathery turtle skin?

the way the somewhat loose material crinkles and pulls when the characters move and pose is SOOOOOO characteristic and visually impactful!!! especially on momotaros who’s always doing crazy stuff with his legs. if their bodies were smooth/skintight like the den-o suit, it would be so nothing….

considering the designers could have easily used a more specific material, the fabric look is both vital and intentional! but i doubt these guys are meant to be “wearing clothes” in the same way kintaros wears a vest, or how ryuutaros and deneb are dressed in long coats, with deneb wearing loose pants (does he have a fully mechanical body underneath?)…

therefore, this conundrum continues to disproportionately confound me.

can imagin move their mouths/make facial expressions?

almost certainly, but in my heart the answer is no because masked/monster suit acting has such a specific charm

how it works headcanons

rider form/armor is an exoskeleton/carapace

  • while the armor is never circumvented during a fight, the riders are often heavily injured upon returning to human form
  • so the armor isn’t a separate entity, it’s part of their Actual Body that, while more durable than flesh, is still being slashed and crushed
  • (i THINK this aligns with what little i know about early rider? how their powers were a result of human experimentation/changed the Inside of the rider’s body)
  • the only instance of armor circumvention i can think of is in one of the movies where momotaros gets stabbed (in the stomach maybe?) and starts gushing sand and almost dies for real LOL

ryuutaros’s age

  • at first i decided he was like KO from OK KO, who is consistently, precisely, and in-universe-ly referred to as “6-11 years old” LMAO
  • then i got my friend’s professional analysis of his drawing abilities?! REAL-LIFE CHILDREN’S ART TEACHER REACTS????????
  • professional commentary:
    • definitely older than 6 because 6 year olds can’t draw like that
    • younger than 10, again by drawing ability
    • 8 year olds can be evil
  • verdict: considering his nice airi drawing as well as his immaturity and capacity for evil, ryuutaros is likely 8-9 years old!
  • “it’s giving third grader” - my other friend LOL

child characters being voiced and acted by grown adults

  • wow….. just like el chavo de ocho……. (which i still have not seen LOL)
  • kind of off topic, but i find this intriguing since i’ve never given it much thought before
  • interestingly, the character’s and actor’s ages absolutely do not average out into “teenager”
  • i guess it’s not actually complex, “this actor is a vampire/superhero/little kid” and you take it at face value, but there’s something else to it i can’t put my finger on… maybe it’s just more fun because you and the creator are frolicking in the fields of suspended disbelief together?
  • verdict: unlike a child actor, you CAN suplex ryuutaros and he’ll be fine 💖 love and light in tokuland

possession damage distribution

  • received damage is split 4/5 possessor and 1/5 ryoutarou, so in a fight the imagin basically act as extra hp bars that can swap out or combine LOL
  • in one of the movies momo’s leg got broken while ryoutarou’s leg was fine
  • this is also why their combo forms are stronger

taros’s hands

  • due to ryoutarou’s gentle nature, the taros formed with soft gloved hands instead of cooler/more dangerous monster claws. i think that’s very cute!
  • i guess kintaros is exempt (formed by a different contract holder) but he does have (useless) claws things on the backs of his hands, and nothing on his actual fingers…?

things i dunno

den-o belt buttons

the 4 color-coded buttons existed before any of the taros appeared…. what does this imply……???

how trains work

where do the trains come from?? how do you become the “owner” of a train?? who’s the owner of zeroliner and why are there never any other people on it??? must every train have a matching rider and vice versa????? is the train the source of the rider’s power???????

relationships headcanons

taros’s relationship

it’s not uncommon to assume the elder 3 see ryuutaros as some kind of little brother figure, but i see their collective bond as rid of any relationship implying superiority/inferiority — it is absolutely vital to me that the 4 of them stand as complete equals… and one of them just happens to be an 8-year-old with a gun LSDFGJSLDIFGJFF

any hierarchical superiority momotaros has as their self-appointed leader i think is neutralized because nobody respects him at all

considering kintaros is the only one who isn’t originally “from” ryoutarou, i was a little surprised it wasn’t considered important/the others barely even mentioned it. they’re fast friends :^)

verdict: the taros’s are roommates (ryoutarou’s body) first, coworkers second, and (eventually) best friends third! YIPPEEEEE (SIMULTANEOUS NESTED CATEGORIES)

contract holder and imagin

regarding the relationship between contract holder and imagin, i feel like it’s typical for people to sort any combination of characters into familial or romantic relationships… but i cannot think of a situation where “a secret third thing” isn’t funnier and more interesting!!!

imagin show up somewhere between uncooperative and antagonistic yet they’re obligate ride-or-dies because they will quite literally die if you do… you can’t really hide or hold each other at arm’s length because you have a psychic/telepathic bond, i can only assume you feel the force each other’s emotions…

witnessing their personality front-row and gleaning the (distant, forgotten) past that shaped it by physically experiencing patterns of speech and movement that feel so foreign to your own body…. exchanging habits and body language through muscle memory, slowly growing more attuned and alike over time…. the presence of another in your mind changing from an intrusion to a reassurance….

overpowering others and being overpowered in a way completely unrelated to physical/human strength, or surrendering yourself in the face of mortal danger, knowing the friends you believe in will see things through…….

i guess the verdict is that it’s deeply intimate (no romantic implication) in a really cool fantastical way!

also deneb is a grandma but not yuuto’s grandma, he’s just like that on his own. does that make sense

hana and her parents

MASSIVE SPOILERS for the finale!

HOW MUCH DID HANA KNOWWW THIS IS DRIVING ME INSANEEEEEEEEEEEE

did she even know airi and yuuto were her parents? that she was the key to the future? that they forfeited her and were destroyed along with their entire timeline for that purpose??????????

i don’t think she recognized airi or yuuto, and she ran into ryoutarou by pure chance, but she also stated her mission was to protect ryoutarou (den-o)…..?

how old was she when her timeline was destroyed?????

it’s CRAZY her situation might even be more tragic than yuuto’s which is saying a lot. possibilities:

  1. timeline was destroyed when she was a baby, so she has no memory of her family/past and grew up on the denliner. raised on stories of how the imagin destroy things and in fact orphaned her
  2. timeline was destroyed when she was a child/teenager, but she has no idea why she was the sole survivor, and is now stuck in a parallel universe where everyone she knew and loved has forgotten her
  3. timeline was destroyed when she was a child/teenager, but airi and yuuto kindly explained that their deaths + abandoning her to a parallel universe where everyone has forgotten her is all according to their Master Plan, so goodbye daughter! LMAOOOOOOO

jjba spoilers: TANGENT BUT THE WAY THIS IS EMPORIO STONE OCEAN LFJDKG

like at least yuuto had (the illusion of?) a choice in becoming zeronos and using the cards, and airi was fully aware of their situation and in on the decision-making process, but hana?? she never had a choice and may have been kept in the dark entirely, even from owner who she’s trusted for years……………

also, her critical importance as the key to the future is the only thing i can think of that would disqualify her from becoming den-o (everyone knows she’d be way more capable than ryoutarou LOL), but being The Chosen One has never stopped any protagonist from. being the protagonist and facing every attempt on their life that comes with it! so it’s a half-excuse at best in my book.

(smash announcer voice) ACE!

wow!!! i can’t believe everyone in this show is aro+ace!

while certainly colored by my own genius mind that can make anything not romantic LMAOOO, for the imagin i’d additionally apply the logic of dimple mp100 — since ghosts/spirits have lost their physical forms, it’s rare to find one who feels physical attraction.

considerations

  • i only have a kamen rider sample size of 1.05 (den-o and like 2 episodes of fourze) so i dunno whether or not it’s typical to involve the protagonist in a romance subplot
  • while boys are the target audience, kid’s/family media in general doesn’t shy away from love stories, so i was rather surprised there wasn’t more of that
  • shounen manga for example is(?) aimed at slightly older kids, but it’s led me to consider high levels of “fanservice” the norm for this demographic…

aroace rundown

  • ryoutarou
    • gets along well with others including that girl who was his highschool classmate, but doesn’t express any romantic interest in the show
    • gentarou comments on how cute some girls are in the first episode of fourze, and i don’t think ryoutarou does even that
    • guess he was let off the hook considering the relationship quota was filled by airi and sakurai LOL (AND IT WAS CRAYZAY, SEE MY NOTES IN THE BOTTOM OF THE PAGE)
    • he freaked out upon waking in some woman’s room during urataros’s intro, but i don’t count this as any type of evidence considering that’s a reasonable reaction for any new possessee to have
    • vibes verdict: attraction’s really not important to him, and that doesn’t bother him at all. may secretly be a little smug he doesn’t embarrass himself like airi’s overzealous suitors (and an obligatory “he has more important things to worry about”, “important things” being “getting hit by trucks” LMAO)
  • hana
    • also does not express any romantic interest, she’s very much not a touchy-feely type in general
    • (though she obviously cares about her friends, it’s actually kind of giving “the only acceptable emotion for strong male protagonist to express is anger” LOL)
    • in charge of killing urataros and sieg without remorse LOL, she seems irritated rather than made uncomfortable by their advances(?)
    • i was pleasantly surprised she wasn’t pigeonholed into “protagonist’s obligatory love interest”, but it makes sense in hindsight considering (END-SEASON SPOILER) she’s ryoutarou’s niece
    • vibes verdict: doesn’t want any part in it. probably feels deeply insulted/othered whenever she’s expected to be charmed by urataros/etc. Just Because She’s A Girl, but would rather die than expose her feelings
  • momotaros
    • fighting is his greatest joy in life! and certainly in part due to the target audience he isn’t even fightsexual about it LOL
    • …i can’t recall if there was even any evidence i was gonna cite. literally “source: my brain” LMAO
    • vibes verdict: like ryoutarou he genuinely doesn’t care (ace to ace communication), literally just having fun (being silly, posing, killing and maiming)
  • urataros
    • prodigious flirt, but never gets charmed by others
    • “nothing happened” when he stayed overnight at that woman’s place which makes logistical sense, as getting serious with any one person would forfeit his “just out of reach” allure and freedom to date others
    • his favorite thing in the world is lying/manipulating people to his own ends — what better medium than hordes of willing(?) victims who shower him with attention?
    • vibes verdict: he is meticulously stringing along half the town PURELY for the love of the game which is perhaps the funniest answer on this list LMAOOOOOOO
  • kintaros
    • for whatever reason my brainnote says “definitely knows what sex is” LMAO
    • overbearingly passionate about things that interest him, those interests just don’t involve relationships beyond wanting to help his contract holders/repay ryoutarou
    • vibes verdict: literally just chilling
  • ryuutaros
    • his obsession with airi feels like imprinting, or a desire for attention/acknowledgement, rather than interest in this sense
    • living without a physical form is distressing — you lack the security of having literally anything to call “yours”, much less the agency to move and do as you please… he wants an external source, a “real” person he respects, to validate his existence
    • (wasn’t that last point actually somewhat canon? i forgor)
    • vibes verdict: 8-9 years old 👍
  • airi
    • interesting case of a canon romantic relationship!
    • i can unconventionalize(?) any relationship with my mind but i don’t care enough about sakurai to ponder it LOL
    • vibes verdict: i think she genuinely loved sakurai!
  • yuuto
    • once again, this guy is an interesting case: does he actually feel anything for airi or does he just assume he should, knowing sakurai loves her?
    • has TurboIssues about connecting with others due to his tragic time situation
    • vibes verdict: as if his plate wasn’t crowded enough, i will hit him with the fujiko lupin iii beam — “character becomes even more interesting under an aromantic lens, as it further complicates the issue of expressing their genuine love for others, its perceived validity, and insecurity/frustration from any/all sides regarding reciprocation”
  • deneb
    • was extremely uncomfortable when he took that girl out on a date in yuuto’s body, but it was mostly due to lying about his identity/wasting her time rather than the date itself… he ended up having lots of fun with her later LOL (SO CUTES)
    • vibes verdict: overflowing with kindness and love!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
  • kotarou
    • initially i didn’t have any thoughts about him, but then his movie’s villain was a flirtatious(?) masochist mantis lady imagin and he and teddy were just like. “ok” LMAO
    • teddy bought him a love charm… that’s crazy…….
    • vibes verdict: (smash announcer voice) ACE!

ranking all versions of double action

character albums really take me back despite not actually having watched any(?) anime that had them in the olden days….

1) double action climax form

  • so awesome + everybody is here + the party hyping up ryuutaros’s rap segments is so yakuza 5 protagonists cheering on haruka’s idol performances HEHE

2) double action strike form

  • electric guitar banger, something about the rhythm of the chorus (doesn’t know music terminology)

3) double action wing form

  • beat is super bouncy and the instrumentation is suitably extra

4) double action axe form

  • kintaros’s singing voice is really friggin good LMAO he might be the only one here who’s not getting run over by the pitchcorrection truck

5) action zero

  • melody is repetitive but they are giving it their all + deneb is here

6) double action (sword form)

  • the classic flavor/base form

7) double action gaoh form

  • aforementioned evil version of the theme song

8) real action

  • it’s fine

9) action zero 2010

  • slow ballad(?) (pitchcorrection truck left axe form to run double duty on deneb specifically)

10) double action coffee form

  • i’m glad they included airi and naomi :^) so i feel bad for ranking them low i’m sorry women

11) double action rod form

  • kind of a lot

12) double action gun form

  • it’s boring 😔

airi and yuuto thoughts

tidied-up tag essay from my drawing LOL MASSIVE SPOILERS AHEAD!!!!!

  • i was so entranced by the dining car scene from episode 46…. due to the overall sillyness the rare serious character moments were crazy good
  • that’s my favorite mediatype after all……
  • ‘i’m sure you have suffered so much’ THE LEVEL OF TIMETRAGEDY IS CRAZYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYY
  • wanting so badly to connect with others but giving up because everyone you care about forgets you ever existed again and again
  • the first and only person to acknowledge what you’ve been enduring alone for years
  • and it’s the most important person in your life except you don’t Actually know each other
  • this isn’t even a ship to me this is a SITUATION GOOD GRAVY!!!!!!!!!!!!!
  • scene had many flowers which aren’t necessarily christmas decor but were in fact airi’s theme in the sakurailess timeline…….
  • the helpless(?) airi actually having been entirely complicit from the start and in fact the person responsible for ryoutarou becoming den-o
  • forfeiting your life’s greatest joy and intentionally walking to your death for the sake of a future neither you
  • nor anyone else in this timeline will be able to experience
  • blind hope? resentment for the choices you (a different you) made for yourself?
  • the lingering horror of not knowing what you’ve forgotten and that you are doomed to forget again
  • also yuuto and deneb living in a lookout tower/park structure(???) because any landlord would inevitably forget he/his lease exists
  • i love how they just show you this kind of stuff without elaboration like MAN!!!!!!!!!!!
  • first appearance: this new guy kinda sucks / end of show: I SEE
  • ok brain exorcism essay over this could be avoided if i just made textposts like a normal person
  • WAIT. HOW OLD WAS HANA when her timeline was destroyed……………………………………….
  • LIKE?? DID SHE KNOW airi and yuuto orphaned her and sentenced her to be forgotten by the entire world???????
  • WAIT ALSO IN THIS SCENE the lights reflecting off the windows made it look like a view of a starry sky (EXPLODES)

this page is too darn long, so here is an image for making it all the way down here, somehow
